S1_avatar.notes: Clean yearbook portrait with laser backdrop, plaid-under-sweater outfit authentic to 90s. No yearbook-page overlay clutter. Good face likeness preserved. Film grain texture adds authenticity.

S2_edit.notes: Dark indigo denim jacket with visible stitching and brass buttons as prompted. Background perfectly preserved. Natural fabric fold rendering. Clean collar transition. Slightly darker jacket than typical denim.

S3_poster.notes: Exceptional Art Deco style design. All text perfectly rendered: UC BERKELEY MUSIC SOCIETY, SPRING AUDITIONS, Date/Location/Time all correct. Gold/navy palette. Violin, treble clef, trumpet motifs. Clean hierarchy. Even added fictional website. Best poster across all tests.

S4_character.notes: Portrait orientation full-body. Obsidian armor with purple energy veins, flowing cape, narrow visor. Low angle hero stance in ruined NYC (NYPD car, neon signs NIGHT CITY/TECH). Very faithful to prompt. Rich environmental detail.

method: Priority-ordered narrative prompts, explicit constraints, text-first hack
